name: Madame Wu's Chinese Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Oil for deep frying in wok
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam chicken breasts or cook in microwave until barely done; skin, bone and shred using 2 forks.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, mix soy sauce, mustard, sesame oil, and Five Spice Powder (available in Asian food sections of most supermarkets). Add sliced green onions; marinade chicken in this mixture, covered.
3. Heat oil very hot in a wok. Drop a piece of won ton skin into the oil; if it floats right back up, the oil is hot enough.
4. Fry won ton skins until just beginning to turn golden, then remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
5. Fry rice noodles in hot oil for a few seconds; they will puff up almost immediately. Remove and drain immediately.
6. When ready to serve, slice lettuce thinly (reserve some whole leaves to garnish the bowl). Add chicken, marinade, fried won ton skins, fried noodles (crumble a little as you add them), and almonds. Serve in a large bowl ringed with whole lettuce leaves.
